title: Handoff Coordination for Marketing Agencies
thesis: A subscription product focused on handoff coordination could win with marketing agencies by reducing unclear ownership under conditions shaped by service productization.

title: Proposal-to-kickoff Flow for Service Firms
thesis: A subscription product focused on proposal-to-kickoff flow could win with service firms by reducing scope creep under conditions shaped by faster onboarding expectations.

title: Client Onboarding Workflow for Service Firms
thesis: A workflow saas product focused on client onboarding could win with service firms by reducing scope creep under conditions shaped by more clients.
